zh.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco於1150年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾黑阿德爾。他與Unknown de Whidfield結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bosco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmine, Sal, Ignazio, Antonio, Attilio, Cosimo, Francesco, Gaspare, Luigi, Saverio.

Italian: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from bosco ‘wood’, from Late Latin boscus ‘shrub, undergrowth’ (of Gallic or ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from a place called with this word. In some cases it may have been an occupational name for a woodsman or forester and, by extension, a nickname for a surly or rough person. Compare Lo Bosco .

variants.name: Boschetti
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Angelina, Antonio, Guido, Rosario.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Bosco  .

variants.name: Lo Bosco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Gennaro, Sal, Salvatore, Antonino, Nichola, Pasquale, Piera, Raffaela, Rocco.
Italian (southern; also Lobosco): variant of Bosco , with the addition of the definite article lo.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco was born in 1150, in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Unknown de Whidfield. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco est né en 1150, à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Unknown de Whidfield. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco wurde 1150 in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat Unknown de Whidfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco è nato il nel 1150 nel Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Unknown de Whidfield. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Boscoは1150年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドルで生まれた。Unknown de Whidfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco(은)는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에서 태어났다. 그는 Unknown de Whidfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco nasceu em 1150, em Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Unknown de Whidfield. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco родился в 1150 г. в местности чидл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown de Whidfield. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Bosco nació en 1150, en Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Unknown de Whidfield. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
